---
title: "Kazakstan"
subtitle: "Quarterly country report"
author: "CCC cc"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY[Q]Q"
---

## Last news
* [Экономическое развитие как путь к миру: Токаев](https://www.zakon.kz/sobytiia/6508520-ekonomicheskoe-razvitie-kak-put-k-miru--tokaev-napisal-statyu-dlya-amerikanskogo-zhurnala.html) (Источник *National Interest*)

## FX
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
from db_utils import sovdb_read
from datetime import datetime
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.rcParams['axes.titlelocation'] = 'left'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlesize'] = 20
plt.rcParams['axes.titleweight'] = 'bold'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlepad'] = 20

plt.rcParams['axes.spines.top'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.left'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.bottom'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.right'] = False

plt.rcParams['figure.autolayout'] = True


Start = datetime(2016,1,1)
df = sovdb_read("FX_KZTUSD_NBK",Start)

if not df.empty:    
    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(df)
    plt.title('KZT strengthened')    
    plt.show()
    plt.close()
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text 
:::

::::
